style_effects: Subtle steam wisps curl from Squirtle's armored joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished steel shell. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically along the seams of its armor, casting sharp, metallic reflections on the ground. Cool cyan light emanates from its core, casting long, precise shadows under a moonlit sky. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
